sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58587" key="kollabi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολλᾰβίζω</orth>, play a game, in which one holds his eyes, while the other strikes him, and bids him guess which hand he has been struck with, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.129</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
